# Type Alias: experimental\_InferContext\<T\>

> **experimental\_InferContext**\<`T`\> = `Static`\<`ReturnType`\<*typeof* `createObject`\>\>

Utility type to infer context types from Prompt arguments.

Used with parse function to ensure type safety when providing context values.

## Type Parameters

### T

`T` *extends* `Record`\<`string`, [`experimental_TSchema`](experimental_TSchema.md)\>
